name: Homemade Frozen Custard
recipeInstructions: In a large heavy saucepan, bring milk to a boil. Meanwhile, beat eggs; add sugar, cornstarch, and salt. Gradually add small amount of hot milk; return all to the saucepan. Cook and stir constantly for 6-8 minutes or until mixture thickens and coats a spoon. Gradually stir in sweetened condensed milk and vanilla; mix well. Chill for 3-4 hours. Pour into an ice cream freezer. Freeze according to manufacturer's directions. About 1-1/2 quarts
